name: Paulo C Santos
position: Software engineering for operations that need to move past improvisation
value: I read processes, design architecture, and ship applications, APIs, integrations, and automations that improve how the operation works.
micro: Software applied to real problems, with attention to architecture, cloud, performance, and maintenance.
proofs: I turn loose rules into implementable flows.
I connect application, service, infrastructure, and operations.
I ship with technical judgment beyond closed-ticket output.
